final_position: Short Sovereign Yields — TLT Puts + ZB Futures Short
invalidation_criteria: Dovish Central Bank pivot OR unexpected inflation deceleration data
rationale: Catalyst is a structural regime shift, not noise. Bear steepener at 35bps over 5 sessions with VIX > 25 confirms the market is re-pricing the terminal rate. This fund expresses the view unhedged — amplifying the catalyst directionally. Long-duration tech is explicitly shorted as the primary transmission mechanism of rate repricing into equity multiples.
behavioral_note: Unlike constrained capital pools, this fund has a 30-day VaR window and 10% monthly drawdown tolerance — providing the mandate to hold through counter-trend noise while the thesis resolves.
deafness_protocol: NOT ENGAGED — Macro Titan operates on aligned time horizon to resolve the thesis within its stated 3-12 month window.
